name: Agricultural Grain Elevator Fumigant Reporting
description:
The 'Midwest Cooperative Grain Elevator' facility requires an update to its Tier II report to account for seasonal fumigant storage. You must update the facility's overarching regulatory compliance status and log a newly introduced water-reactive Extremely Hazardous Substance (EHS). Using EPA Tier2 Submit 2025 (already running), import the baseline facility data from C:\workspace\data\midwest_grain_coop.t2s. 

Perform the following updates:
1. Update the facility's 'Subject to EPCRA Section 302' regulatory designation to 'Yes'.
2. Add a new chemical: 'Aluminum Phosphide' (CAS: 20859-73-8).
3. Mark the chemical as an Extremely Hazardous Substance (EHS).
4. Set Physical State to 'Solid'.
5. Set Physical Hazards: Check 'In contact with water emits flammable gas'.
6. Set Health Hazards: Check 'Acute toxicity (any route of exposure)'.
7. Set Maximum Daily Amount to Range Code 03 (500 - 999 lbs).
8. Set Average Daily Amount to Range Code 02 (100 - 499 lbs).
9. Set Number of Days On-Site to 90.
10. Add a Storage Location with Type 'Drum' (or equivalent), Ambient pressure, Ambient temperature, and Location Description: 'Pesticide Storage Locker, Building B'.

When complete, save and export the submission file to: C:\Users\Docker\Documents\midwest_coop_updated.t2s
